since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.16% · Gold -0.96% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.70%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.81%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +2.24%, AVAV +2.15%, OKTA +2.08%, BIDU +2.05%, PUBM +1.45%. Laggards: SKHY -6.81%, MU -5.01%, ARM -4.43%, TER -4.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.64% at $134.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
